title: U.S. Regulators Advancing Oversight of Crypto and Prediction Markets; SEC Submits Guidance on Securities Laws Application
message_html: U.S. Regulators Advancing Oversight of Crypto and Prediction Markets; SEC Submits Guidance on Securities Laws Application ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to Bloomberg, U.S. regulators are advancing oversight of crypto and prediction markets. The U.S. SEC has submitted commission-level guidance to the White House on the application of federal securities laws to certain crypto assets, potentially introducing a t
